model.treasuryLedgerNetUsd: treasury USDC delta - real burned SOL gas
model.totalSystemNetUsdEstimate: treasury USDC delta - real burned SOL gas - estimated TX0 SOL cushion converted to USDC
model.limitation: Kimi receipts do not persist exact cushionSolLamports, so cushion is estimated from route config.

conclusion: Kimi demonstrates treasury USDC growth. RedemptionArc must separately prove total-system growth before scaling.
